rolling_origin_cross_validation.method: prophet.diagnostics.cross_validation on the daily model that serves forecasts
rolling_origin_cross_validation.interpretation: Out-of-sample MAPE ~8-11% across 4 rolling folds. Coverage of the 80% interval is ~79-82% across reagents, i.e. the uncertainty bands are well calibrated (close to the nominal 80%). This is the headline accuracy figure.
rolling_origin_cross_validation.note: DEMO — synthetic daily data calibrated with real AR demand patterns

self_consistency_on_synthetic_daily.method: Prophet fit and scored on its own training data
self_consistency_on_synthetic_daily.note: NOT a real test — kept only for transparency. Use rolling_origin_cross_validation instead.

monthly_holdout_backtest.method: Train on 2024-2025 seeded MONTHLY points, predict 2026 hold-out
monthly_holdout_backtest.caveat: Illustrative only. The TSH figure rests on 7 monthly test points; the Hemograma/Ionograma figures rested on a SINGLE test point each and are statistically meaningless — they have been DROPPED from all reported metrics. Do not cite the monthly MAPE as the model's accuracy; cite rolling_origin_cross_validation.
monthly_holdout_backtest.note: DEMO — synthetic monthly data calibrated with real AR demand patterns
